title: Work with an Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander Community or organisation

competent_person_statement: A competent person in Work with an Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander Community or organisation demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.
